226/*
227 * Statically defined limit number of APs, EPs, SSIDs
228 * Only to be used for initial hw devs/ifaces detection
229 */
230#define MAXNROF_RADIO (3)
231#define MAXNROF_ACCESSPOINT (16)
232#define MAXNROF_ENDPOINT (32)
233#define MAXNROF_SSID (MAXNROF_ACCESSPOINT + MAXNROF_ENDPOINT)
234
235#define MAXNROF_MFENTRY (32)
236#define MAXNROF_PFENTRY (32)
237#define NR_OF_STICKY_UNAUTHORIZED_STATIONS 1
238#define MAXNROF_STAENTRY (wld_getMaxNrSta() + NR_OF_STICKY_UNAUTHORIZED_STATIONS)
239
240/*
241 * APIs to get learned global limit number of: stations, accessPoints, endpoints, SSIDs
242 */
243int32_t wld_getMaxNrSta();
244uint32_t wld_getMaxNrAPs();
245uint32_t wld_getMaxNrEPs();
246uint32_t wld_getMaxNrSSIDs();
247
248#define MAX_FSM_STACK_STATE (16)
249#define FSM_BW (2)

251/* Used for DEBUGGING!!! FIX ME - this must be removed at end of project */
252#define ENDP_POINTER 0x454E4450 /* "ENDP" */
253#define VAP_POINTER 0x20564150 /* " VAP" */
254#define RAD_POINTER 0x20524144 /* " RAD" */
255#define SSID_POINTER 0x53534944 /* "SSID" */
256#define ENDP_POINTER 0x454E4450 /* "ENDP" */
257
258
259#define GET (0) /* Get data directly from cached data (default) */
260#define SET (1) /* Set data */
261#define NO_COMMIT (2) /* Don't commit it (only on SET) */
262#define DIRECT (4) /* Get or Set data directly from driver (Don't use the FSM) */
263#define MVRADIO (8) /* Multi Vendor Radio */
264
265/* Always the same... if you don't have it, it fails. When you set it, it complains! */
266#ifndef FALSE
267 #define FALSE 0
268#endif
269#ifndef TRUE
270 #define TRUE 1
271#endif
272
273
274//Generic OK return
275#define WLD_OK SWL_RC_OK
276
277
278//Return ok and work is done
279#define WLD_OK_DONE SWL_RC_DONE
280
281//Return ok and work is continueing
282#define WLD_OK_CONTINUE SWL_RC_CONTINUE
283
284//Generic wld error state
285#define WLD_ERROR SWL_RC_ERROR
286//Invalid parameter
287#define WLD_ERROR_INVALID_PARAM SWL_RC_INVALID_PARAM
288//Invalid state
289#define WLD_ERROR_INVALID_STATE SWL_RC_INVALID_STATE
290//Requested function not implemented
291#define WLD_ERROR_NOT_IMPLEMENTED SWL_RC_NOT_IMPLEMENTED

394/*
395 * @brief enum define all WPS configuration methods as per tr-181-2-15-1-usp
396 * They correspond directly to the "Config Methods" attribute of
397 * Wi-Fi_Protected_Setup_Specification_v2.0.8 (Table 33 - Configuration Methods)
398 */
399typedef enum {
400 WPS_CFG_MTHD_USBFD, // USBA (Flash Drive): Deprecated
401 WPS_CFG_MTHD_ETH, // Ethernet: Deprecated
402 WPS_CFG_MTHD_LABEL, // Label: 8 digit static PIN, typically available on device.
403 WPS_CFG_MTHD_DISPLAY, // Display: A dynamic 4 or 8 digit PIN is available from a display.
404 WPS_CFG_MTHD_EXTNFCTOKEN, // External NFC Token: An NFC Tag is used to transfer the configuration or device password.
405 WPS_CFG_MTHD_INTNFCTOKEN, // Integrated NFC Token: The NFC Tag is integrated in the device.
406 WPS_CFG_MTHD_NFCINTF, // NFC Interface: The device contains an NFC interface.
407 WPS_CFG_MTHD_PBC, // Pushbutton: The device contains either a physical or virtual Pushbutton.
408 WPS_CFG_MTHD_PIN, // same as legacy "Keypad": Device is capable of entering a PIN
409 /* Below enums are only defined in WPS 2.x */
410 WPS_CFG_MTHD_PBC_P, // Physical Pushbutton: A physical Pushbutton is available on the device.
411 WPS_CFG_MTHD_DISPLAY_P, // Physical Display PIN: The dynamic 4 or 8 digit PIN is shown on a display/screen that is part of the device.
412 WPS_CFG_MTHD_PBC_V, // Virtual Pushbutton: Pushbutton functionality is available through a software user interface.
413 WPS_CFG_MTHD_DISPLAY_V, // Virtual Display PIN: The dynamic 4 or 8 digit PIN is displayed through a remote user interface.
414 WPS_CFG_MTHD_MAX
415} wld_wps_cfgMethod_e;
416
417#define M_WPS_CFG_MTHD_USBFD (SWL_BIT_SHIFT(WPS_CFG_MTHD_USBFD))
418#define M_WPS_CFG_MTHD_ETH (SWL_BIT_SHIFT(WPS_CFG_MTHD_ETH))
419#define M_WPS_CFG_MTHD_LABEL (SWL_BIT_SHIFT(WPS_CFG_MTHD_LABEL))
420#define M_WPS_CFG_MTHD_DISPLAY (SWL_BIT_SHIFT(WPS_CFG_MTHD_DISPLAY))
421#define M_WPS_CFG_MTHD_EXTNFCTOKEN (SWL_BIT_SHIFT(WPS_CFG_MTHD_EXTNFCTOKEN))
422#define M_WPS_CFG_MTHD_INTNFCTOKEN (SWL_BIT_SHIFT(WPS_CFG_MTHD_INTNFCTOKEN))
423#define M_WPS_CFG_MTHD_NFCINTF (SWL_BIT_SHIFT(WPS_CFG_MTHD_NFCINTF))
424#define M_WPS_CFG_MTHD_PBC (SWL_BIT_SHIFT(WPS_CFG_MTHD_PBC))
425#define M_WPS_CFG_MTHD_PIN (SWL_BIT_SHIFT(WPS_CFG_MTHD_PIN))
426#define M_WPS_CFG_MTHD_PBC_P (SWL_BIT_SHIFT(WPS_CFG_MTHD_PBC_P))
427#define M_WPS_CFG_MTHD_DISPLAY_P (SWL_BIT_SHIFT(WPS_CFG_MTHD_DISPLAY_P))
428#define M_WPS_CFG_MTHD_PBC_V (SWL_BIT_SHIFT(WPS_CFG_MTHD_PBC_V))
429#define M_WPS_CFG_MTHD_DISPLAY_V (SWL_BIT_SHIFT(WPS_CFG_MTHD_DISPLAY_V))
430
431#define M_WPS_CFG_MTHD_PBC_ALL (M_WPS_CFG_MTHD_PBC | M_WPS_CFG_MTHD_PBC_P | M_WPS_CFG_MTHD_PBC_V)
432#define M_WPS_CFG_MTHD_DISPLAY_ALL (M_WPS_CFG_MTHD_DISPLAY | M_WPS_CFG_MTHD_DISPLAY_P | M_WPS_CFG_MTHD_DISPLAY_V)
433// All WPS 1.x config method flags
434#define M_WPS_CFG_MTHD_WPS10_ALL (M_WPS_CFG_MTHD_PBC_P - 1)
435
436typedef swl_mask_m wld_wps_cfgMethod_m;

513extern const char* cstr_chanmgt_rad_state[];
517typedef enum {
518 // Radio in unknown state
519 CM_RAD_UNKNOWN,
520 // Radio in down state
521 CM_RAD_DOWN,
522 // Radio in up state
523 CM_RAD_UP,
524 // Radio performing a foreground channel availability check, and as such is dormant
525 CM_RAD_FG_CAC,
526 // Radio performing a background channel availability check, expecting to move there when done
527 CM_RAD_BG_CAC,
528 // Radio performing a background channel availability check by external provider, expecting to move there when done
529 CM_RAD_BG_CAC_EXT,
530 // Radio performing a background channel availability check, not switching when done
531 CM_RAD_BG_CAC_NS,
532 // Radio performing a background channel availability check by external provider, not switching when done
533 CM_RAD_BG_CAC_EXT_NS,
534 // Radio currently undergoing configuration
535 CM_RAD_CONFIGURING,
536 // Radio in deep power down state
537 CM_RAD_DEEP_POWER_DOWN,
538 // Radio is starting and AP broadcast must be delayed
539 CM_RAD_DELAY_AP_UP,
540 // Radio in error state
541 CM_RAD_ERROR,
542 // End of enum, use for initializing array length
543 CM_RAD_MAX
544} chanmgt_rad_state;
545
546/* PFN_WRAD_DFSRADARTRIGGER - "One-shot"-Radar simulation with optional sub-band modes */
547typedef enum {
548 DFST_RP_NONE, /* Do nothing (default) */
549 DFST_RP_ON_CH, /* DFS Radar Pulse when ON-channel */
550 DFST_RP_OFF_CH, /* DFS Radar Pulse when OFF-Channel */
551 DFST_RP_AUTO, /* Driver default Radar Pulse (When on DFS "ON", when on !DFS "OFF") */
552 DFST_RP_CLR_STATUS, /* Force to Clear Radar status */
553 DFST_RP_CLR_OSC, /* Force to Clear Out of Service channels */
554 DFST_RP_MAX /* End of enum, use for initializing array length */
555} dfstrigger_rad_state;
556
557/* This structure will be attached on the OBJECT void pointer of the datamodel */
558typedef struct {
559 FSM_STATE FSM_State; // Our main state
560 FSM_STATE FSM_ReqState; // State to which vendor wants FSM to move, in certain places
561 int FSM_Delay; // Delay the FSM with some cycles
562 int FSM_ComPend; // Commit Pending?
563 int FSM_Error; // Error Message
564 int FSM_Warning; // Warning Message
565 int FSM_Retry; // Retry the config?
566 int FSM_SyncAll; // Force all states (Need Radio marking)
567 int FSM_Loop; // Keep looping on the same FSM state (danger).
568 int FSM_SrcVAP; // VAP State Run Count. Track if state has been done
569 unsigned long FSM_BitActionArray[FSM_BW]; // 'bit' states?
570 amxp_timer_t* timer;
571 int TODC; // TimeOut Delayed Commit
572 amxp_timer_t* obj_DelayCommit;
573 unsigned int timeout_msec;
574
575 /* Isolate ongoing Active Commit (AC) actions from inbetween config/commits */
576 unsigned long FSM_AC_BitActionArray[FSM_BW];
577
578 /* The state of the FSM_BitActionArray at last dependency copy to AC" */
579 unsigned long FSM_AC_CSC[FSM_BW];
580 swl_timeMono_t FSM_ComPend_Start; //time when commit pend started
581 uint32_t retryCount; //how many times fase has been retried.
582} T_FSM;
583
584typedef struct {
585 uint32_t nrStarts; // The number of time the FSM moved from IDLE to non IDLE
586 uint32_t nrRunStarts; // The number of times the FSM moved to "run" mode
587 uint32_t nrFinish; // The number of times the FSM moved to "run" mode
588} wld_fsmStats_t;
589
590typedef struct wld_apNeighbour {
591 amxc_llist_it_t it;
592 char bssid[ETHER_ADDR_LEN];
593 char ssid[SSID_NAME_LEN];
594 int information;
595 swl_operatingClass_t operatingClass;
596 int channel;
597 int phyType;
598 char nasIdentifier[NAS_IDENTIFIER_MAX_LEN];
599 char r0khkey[KHKEY_MAX_LEN];
600 char r1khkey[KHKEY_MAX_LEN];
601 bool colocatedAp;
602 amxd_object_t* obj;
603} wld_apNeighbour_t;
604
605/* Discovery methods to announce an AP
606 * - AP_DM_DISABLED: Disabled
607 * - AP_DM_RNR: Reduced Neighboring Report
608 * - AP_DM_UPR: Unsolicited Probe Response
609 * - AP_DM_FD: FILS Discovery
610 * - AP_DM_MAX: end of enum
611 */
612typedef enum {
613 AP_DM_DEFAULT,
614 AP_DM_DISABLED,
615 AP_DM_RNR,
616 AP_DM_UPR,
617 AP_DM_FD,
618 AP_DM_MAX,
619} wld_ap_dm_e;
620
621#define M_AP_DM_DEFAULT (1 << AP_DM_DEFAULT)
622#define M_AP_DM_DISABLED (1 << AP_DM_DISABLED)
623#define M_AP_DM_RNR (1 << AP_DM_RNR)
624#define M_AP_DM_UPR (1 << AP_DM_UPR)
625#define M_AP_DM_FD (1 << AP_DM_FD)
626typedef uint32_t wld_ap_dm_m;
627extern const char* g_str_wld_ap_dm[];
628
629/* These base structures are based on the TR181 docs */
630#define WLD_TEMP_INVALID_CELSIUS -274 // Temperature of The chipset, this is the default value which is INVALID.
631
632
633typedef struct {
634 uint32_t maxMuClients; /* Maximum MU clients. */
635 uint32_t nbMuClients; /* current nbr of MU MIMO clients. (i.e admitted) */
636 uint32_t nbActiveMuClients; /* current nbr of Active MU MIMO clients receiving data in MU Group. */
637 uint32_t txAsMuPktsCnt; /* current count of TX packets sent as MU. */
638 time_t lastRefreshTime; /* Timestamp of the last refresh of mu mimo info */
639} wld_rad_muMimoInfo_t;
640
641typedef struct {
642 uint32_t muGroupId; /* current MU Group ID (GID: 1-62). */
643 uint32_t muUserPosId; /* current MU User Position ID (GID: 1-4). */
644 uint32_t txAsMuPktsCnt; /* current count of TX packets sent as MU. */
645 uint32_t txAsMuPktsPrc; /* current percentage of TX packets sent as MU. */
646} wld_sta_muMimoInfo_t;
647
648/* From IEEE 802.11 Draft P802.11ax D8.0 fig 9-589cn */
649#define D11_HE_MCS_0_7 0
650#define D11_HE_MCS_0_9 1
651#define D11_HE_MCS_0_11 2
652#define D11_HE_MCS_NONE 3
653
654#define D11_HE_MCS_SUBFIELD_SIZE 2
655#define D11_HE_MCS_SUBFIELD_MASK 0x3
656
657/*
658 * @brief arguments for BSS Transfer request
659 */
660typedef struct {
661 swl_macChar_t sta; /* MAC of the station to steer */
662 swl_macChar_t targetBssid; /* Bss transition request's target BSSID */
663 swl_operatingClass_t operClass; /* Operating class of target AP */
664 swl_channel_t channel; /* Channel of target AP */
665 swl_ieee802_btmReqMode_m reqModeMask; /* request mode (prefered list, abridge, dissoc imminent, ...) */
666 int validity; /* Timer of the bss request validity */
667 int disassoc; /* Timer before device disassociation */
668 uint32_t bssidInfo; /* BSSID Info data */
669 int transitionReason; /* MBO Transition reason */
670} wld_transferStaArgs_t;
671
672typedef struct {
673 swl_timeMono_t updateTime;
674 swl_mcs_supMCS_t supportedMCS;
675 swl_mcs_supMCS_t supportedHtMCS;
676 swl_mcs_supMCS_adv_t supportedVhtMCS[SWL_COM_DIR_MAX];
677 swl_mcs_supMCS_adv_t supportedHeMCS[SWL_COM_DIR_MAX];
678 swl_mcs_supMCS_adv_t supportedHe160MCS[SWL_COM_DIR_MAX];
679 swl_mcs_supMCS_adv_t supportedHe80x80MCS[SWL_COM_DIR_MAX];
680
681 swl_oui_list_t vendorOUI;
682
683 swl_security_apMode_e currentSecurity;
684 wld_enc_modes_e encryptMode;
685 swl_bandwidth_e linkBandwidth;
686 bool linkBandwidthSetByDriver;
687
688 swl_staCapHt_m htCapabilities; /* bitmap of HT (11n) SGI, MU and beamforming capabilities */
689 swl_staCapVht_m vhtCapabilities; /* bitmap of VHT (11ac) SGI, MU and beamforming capabilities */
690 swl_staCapHe_m heCapabilities; /* bitmap of HE (11ax) SGI, MU and beamforming capabilities */
691 swl_staCapEht_m ehtCapabilities; /* bitmap of EHT (11be) SGI, MU and beamforming capabilities*/
692 swl_staCapRrm_m rrmCapabilities; /* bitmap of RRM Enabled Capabilties */
693 uint32_t rrmOnChannelMaxDuration; /* Operating Channel Max Measurement Duration */
694 uint32_t rrmOffChannelMaxDuration; /* NonOperating Channel Max Measurement Duration */
695 swl_freqBandExt_m freqCapabilities; /* Frequency Capabilities */
696} wld_assocDev_capabilities_t;
697
698#define X_WLD_STA_HISTORY(X, Y) \
699 X(Y, gtSwl_type_timeSpecMono, timestamp) \
700 X(Y, gtSwl_type_int32, signalStrength) \
701 X(Y, gtSwl_type_int32, noise) \
702 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, dataDownlinkRate) \
703 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, dataUplinkRate) \
704 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint64, txBytes) \
705 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint64, rxBytes) \
706 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, txPacketCount) \
707 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, rxPacketCount) \
708 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, txError) \
709 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint64, rxError) \
710 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, txFrameCount) \
711 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, rxFrameCount) \
712 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, tx_Retransmissions) \
713 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, tx_RetransmissionsFailed) \
714 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, rx_Retransmissions) \
715 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, rx_RetransmissionsFailed) \
716 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, retryCount) \
717 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, multipleRetryCount) \
718 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, inactive) \
719 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, powerSave) \
720 X(Y, gtSwl_type_bandwidth, txLinkBandwidth) \
721 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, txSpatialStream) \
722 X(Y, gtSwl_type_mcsStandard, txRateStandard) \
723 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, txMcsIndex) \
724 X(Y, gtSwl_type_bandwidth, rxLinkBandwidth) \
725 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, rxSpatialStream) \
726 X(Y, gtSwl_type_mcsStandard, rxRateStandard) \
727 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, rxMcsIndex)
728
729SWL_TT_H(gtWld_staHistory, wld_staHistory_t, X_WLD_STA_HISTORY, );
730
731typedef struct {
732 uint8_t nr_valid_samples;
733 uint8_t index_last_sample;
734 wld_staHistory_t* samples;
735
736 int32_t signalStrength; /* signalStrength at rssi monitor update */
737 int32_t noise; /* noise at rssi monitor update */
738 int32_t signalNoiseRatio; /* signalNoiseRatio at rssi monitor update */
739 swl_timeSpecReal_t measurementTimestamp; /* rssi monitor update timestamp */
740 int32_t signalStrengthAssoc; /* first rssi monitor signalStrength since Wi-Fi assoc event */
741 int32_t noiseAssoc; /* first rssi monitor noise since Wi-Fi assoc event */
742 int32_t signalNoiseRatioAssoc; /* first rssi monitor signalNoiseRatio since Wi-Fi assoc event */
743 swl_timeSpecReal_t measurementTimestampAssoc; /* timestamp of first rssi monitor update since Wi-Fi assoc event */
744} wld_assocDev_history_t;
745
751typedef struct {
752 amxd_object_t* object;
753 amxc_llist_it_t it;
754 T_AccessPoint* pAP;
755 swl_macBin_t mac;
756 uint32_t linkId;
757 uint32_t index;
758 bool active;
759 uint64_t bytesSent;
760 uint64_t bytesReceived;
761 uint32_t packetsSent;
762 uint32_t packetsReceived;
763 uint32_t errorsSent;
764 uint32_t errorsReceived;
765 int32_t signalStrength;
766 int32_t noise;
767 uint32_t lastDataDownlinkRate;
768 uint32_t lastDataUplinkRate;
769 swl_mcs_t upLinkRateSpec; /* Up link rate info (standard, mcs index, guard interval, number of spacial streams, bandwidth) */
770 swl_mcs_t downLinkRateSpec; /* down link rate info (standard, mcs index, guard interval, number of spacial streams, bandwidth) */
771} wld_affiliatedSta_t;
772
773typedef struct {
774 amxc_llist_it_t entry;
775 bool active;
776 char* name;
777 int32_t index;
778 swl_macBin_t bStaMac;
779 T_AccessPoint* ap;
780} wld_wds_intf_t;
781
782typedef struct {
783 char Name[32]; /* Name tag.*/
784 unsigned char MACAddress[ETHER_ADDR_LEN]; /* MAC address of station */
785 amxd_object_t* object;
786 char Radius_CUID[256]; /* Chargeable-User-Identity attribute in Radius Access-Accept */
787 bool AuthenticationState; /* Associate STA or device authenticated? */
788 uint32_t LastDataDownlinkRate;
789 uint32_t LastDataUplinkRate;
790 int32_t SignalStrength;
791 int32_t minSignalStrength;
792 swl_timeMono_t minSignalStrengthTime;
793 int32_t maxSignalStrength;
794 swl_timeMono_t maxSignalStrengthTime;
795 int32_t meanSignalStrength;
796 int32_t meanSignalStrengthExpAccumulator;
797 int32_t meanSignalStrengthLinearAccumulator;
798 uint32_t nrMeanSignalStrength;
799 double SignalStrengthByChain[MAX_NR_ANTENNA]; /* dBm */
800 double noiseByChain[MAX_NR_ANTENNA]; /* dBm */
801 int32_t AvgSignalStrengthByChain; /* dBm */
802 int32_t noise; /* dBm */
803 int32_t SignalNoiseRatio; /* dB */
804 uint32_t Retransmissions;
805 uint32_t Rx_Retransmissions;
806 uint32_t Tx_Retransmissions;
807 uint32_t Tx_RetransmissionsFailed;
808 uint32_t Rx_RetransmissionsFailed;
809 uint32_t retryCount; /* The number of packets that were successfully transmitted after one or more retransmissions */
810 uint32_t multipleRetryCount; /* The number of packets that were successfully transmitted after more than one retransmission */
811 bool Active; /* Whether station is actually connected, potentially not Authenticated */
812 bool seen; /* data field for maclist updates */
813 bool operatingStandardSetByDriver;
814 swl_radStd_e operatingStandard;
815
816 wld_assocDev_capabilities_t assocCaps;
817 wld_assocDev_capabilities_t probeReqCaps;
818
819 swl_uniiBand_m uniiBandsCapabilities; /* bitmap of UNII bands capabilities */
820 swl_timeSpecMono_t lastSampleTime; /* mono time of last sample update */
821 swl_timeSpecMono_t lastSampleSyncTime; /* mono time of last update to data model */
822 swl_timeMono_t lastProbeCapUpdateTime; /* mono time when probe info was last updated */
823
824 uint32_t Inactive; /* seconds */
825 uint32_t RxPacketCount;
826 uint32_t TxPacketCount;
827 uint64_t RxBytes;
828 uint64_t TxBytes;
829 uint32_t RxUnicastPacketCount;
830 uint32_t TxUnicastPacketCount;
831 uint32_t RxMulticastPacketCount;
832 uint32_t TxMulticastPacketCount;
833 uint32_t TxFailures;
834 uint64_t RxFailures;
835
836 uint32_t TxFrameCount; /* total of user frames sent successfully */
837 /* the difference is that a packet is a unit of transmission as requested by upper
838 layer and a frame is a unit of transmission sent on the wire, possible aggregating
839 packets if small, or splitting them if big.*/
840 uint32_t RxFrameCount;
841 uint32_t UplinkMCS;
842 uint32_t UplinkBandwidth; /* Uplink channel bandwidth in MHz (20/40/80/160)*/
843 uint32_t UplinkShortGuard; /* 400ns guard interval */
844
845 uint32_t DownlinkMCS;
846 uint32_t DownlinkBandwidth; /* Downlink channel bandwidth in MHz (20/40/80/160)*/
847 uint32_t DownlinkShortGuard;
848
849 swl_mcs_t upLinkRateSpec; /* Up link rate info (standard, mcs index, guard interval, number of spacial streams, bandwidth) */
850 swl_mcs_t lastNonLegacyUplinkMCS;
851 swl_timeMono_t lastNonLegacyUplinkTime;
852 swl_mcs_t downLinkRateSpec; /* down link rate info (standard, mcs index, guard interval, number of spacial streams, bandwidth) */
853 swl_mcs_t lastNonLegacyDownlinkMCS;
854 swl_timeMono_t lastNonLegacyDownlinkTime;
855
856 uint16_t MaxRxSpatialStreamsSupported; /* number of Rx Spatial streams*/
857 uint16_t MaxTxSpatialStreamsSupported; /* number of Tx Spatial streams*/
858 uint32_t MaxDownlinkRateSupported;
859 uint32_t MaxDownlinkRateReached;
860 uint32_t MaxUplinkRateSupported;
861 uint32_t MaxUplinkRateReached;
862 swl_bandwidth_e MaxBandwidthSupported;
863
864 bool powerSave;
865 int deviceType; /* The device type: index of device type in the cstr_DEVICE_TYPES */
866 int devicePriority; /* The priority of this device. Secondary to device type. */
867 swl_timeMono_t latestStateChangeTime; /* Timestamp of the last time the state of this device changed */
868 int32_t rssiAccumulator; /* Accumulator for RSSi data */
869 int32_t rssiLevel; /* Latest RSSi event */
870 swl_staCap_m capabilities; /* Capabilities of the station */
871 swl_staCapVendor_m vendorCapabilities; /* Vendor Capabilities of the station (MS, WFA) */
872 uint32_t connectionDuration; /* duration of connexion (seconds) */
873 swl_timeMono_t associationTime; /* Timestamp of the last time the sta finalized association, i.e. got authorized */
874 swl_timeMono_t disassociationTime; /* Timestamp of the last time the sta disassociate, in real time */
875 bool hadSecFailure; /* Number of security failures of this station */
876 wld_sta_muMimoInfo_t staMuMimoInfo;
877 wld_assocDev_history_t* staHistory;
878 swl_IEEE80211deauthReason_ne lastDeauthReason; /* last deauth reason for this sta */
879 swl_timeMono_t lastDeauthAssocTime; /* association timestamp of last de-authenticated connection */
880 void* vendor; /* Pointer for wifi chipset vendor data */
881 wld_extMod_dataList_t extDataList; /* list of extention data for non-chipset vendor modules */
882 swla_dm_objActionReadCtx_t onActionReadCtx;
883 uint32_t nrCreatedAffiliatedStaLinks;
884 amxc_llist_t affiliatedStaList; /* list of wld_affiliatedSta_t objects */
885 wld_wds_intf_t* wdsIntf; /* wds interface info */
886 amxp_timer_t* delayDisassocNotif;
887 swl_mlo_mode_e mloMode; /* the Mlo mode */
888} T_AssociatedDevice;
889
890
891SWL_ARRAY_TYPE_H(gtWld_signalStatArray, gtSwl_type_double, MAX_NR_ANTENNA);
892
893
894#define X_T_ASSOCIATED_DEVICE_ANNOT(X, Y) \
895 X(Y, gtSwl_type_macBin, MACAddress, "MACAddress") \
896 X(Y, gtSwl_type_bool, AuthenticationState, "AuthenticationState") \
897 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, LastDataDownlinkRate, "LastDataDownlinkRate") \
898 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, LastDataUplinkRate, "LastDataUplinkRate") \
899 X(Y, gtSwl_type_int32, SignalStrength, "SignalStrength") \
900 X(Y, gtWld_signalStatArray, SignalStrengthByChain, "SignalStrengthByChain") \
901 X(Y, gtWld_signalStatArray, noiseByChain, "NoiseByChain") \
902 X(Y, gtSwl_type_int32, noise, "Noise") \
903 X(Y, gtSwl_type_int32, SignalNoiseRatio, "SignalNoiseRatio") \
904 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, Retransmissions, "Retransmissions") \
905 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, Rx_Retransmissions, "Rx_Retransmissions") \
906 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, Rx_RetransmissionsFailed, "Rx_RetransmissionsFailed") \
907 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, Tx_Retransmissions, "Tx_Retransmissions") \
908 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, Tx_RetransmissionsFailed, "Tx_RetransmissionsFailed") \
909 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, retryCount, "RetryCount") \
910 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, multipleRetryCount, "MultipleRetryCount") \
911 X(Y, gtSwl_type_bool, Active, "Active") \
912 X(Y, gtSwl_type_radStd, operatingStandard, "OperatingStandard") \
913 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, Inactive, "Inactive") \
914 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, RxPacketCount, "RxPacketCount") \
915 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, TxPacketCount, "TxPacketCount") \
916 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint64, RxBytes, "RxBytes") \
917 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint64, TxBytes, "TxBytes") \
918 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, RxUnicastPacketCount, "RxUnicastPacketCount") \
919 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, TxUnicastPacketCount, "TxUnicastPacketCount") \
920 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, RxMulticastPacketCount, "RxMulticastPacketCount") \
921 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, TxMulticastPacketCount, "TxMulticastPacketCount") \
922 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, TxFailures, "TxErrors") \
923 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint64, RxFailures, "RxErrors") \
924 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, TxFrameCount, "TxFrameCount") \
925 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, RxFrameCount, "RxFrameCount") \
926 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, UplinkMCS, "UplinkMCS") \
927 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, UplinkBandwidth, "UplinkBandwidth") \
928 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, UplinkShortGuard, "UplinkShortGuard") \
929 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, DownlinkMCS, "DownlinkMCS") \
930 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, DownlinkBandwidth, "DownlinkBandwidth") \
931 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, DownlinkShortGuard, "DownlinkShortGuard") \
932 X(Y, gtSwl_type_mcs, upLinkRateSpec, "UplinkRateSpec") \
933 X(Y, gtSwl_type_mcs, downLinkRateSpec, "DownlinkRateSpec") \
934 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint16, MaxRxSpatialStreamsSupported, "MaxRxSpatialStreamsSupported") \
935 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint16, MaxTxSpatialStreamsSupported, "MaxTxSpatialStreamsSupported") \
936 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, MaxDownlinkRateSupported, "MaxDownlinkRateSupported") \
937 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, MaxDownlinkRateReached, "MaxDownlinkRateReached") \
938 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, MaxUplinkRateSupported, "MaxUplinkRateSupported") \
939 X(Y, gtSwl_type_uint32, MaxUplinkRateReached, "MaxUplinkRateReached") \
940 X(Y, gtSwl_type_bandwidthUnknown, MaxBandwidthSupported, "MaxBandwidthSupported") \
941 X(Y, gtSwl_type_bool, powerSave, "PowerSave") \
942 X(Y, gtSwl_type_mlo_mode, mloMode, "MLOMode")
943
944
945SWL_NTT_H_ANNOTATE(gtWld_associatedDevice, T_AssociatedDevice, X_T_ASSOCIATED_DEVICE_ANNOT);

947typedef struct wld_nasta {
948 amxc_llist_it_t it;
949 swl_macBin_t bssid; /* Must be set if the station's bssid is required by the driver */
950 unsigned char MACAddress[ETHER_ADDR_LEN]; /* MAC address of station */
951 int32_t SignalStrength;
952 int32_t monRssi;
953 int32_t rssiAccumulator;
954 swl_timeMono_t TimeStamp;
955 amxd_object_t* obj;
956 swl_channel_t channel;
957 swl_operatingClass_t operatingClass;
958 void* vendorData;
959} wld_nasta_t;

961typedef enum {
962 HE_CAP_DEFAULT,
963 HE_CAP_DL_OFDMA,

966 HE_CAP_UL_MUMIMO,
967 HE_CAP_STA_UL_OFDMA,

969 HE_CAP_HE_ER_SU_PPDU_RX,
970 HE_CAP_MAX

979#define M_HE_CAP_STA_UL_MUMIMO (1 << HE_CAP_STA_UL_MUMIMO)
980#define M_HE_CAP_ER_SU_PPDU_RX (1 << HE_CAP_HE_ER_SU_PPDU_RX)

987 RAD_BF_CAP_VHT_SU,

999#define M_RAD_BF_CAP_DEFAULT (1 << RAD_BF_CAP_DEFAULT)

1012typedef enum {
1013 CHAN_REASON_INVALID,

1016 CHAN_REASON_PERSISTANCE, // Load of first saved channel

1019 CHAN_REASON_MANUAL,

1028typedef struct {
1029 amxc_llist_it_t it;
1030 unsigned char MACAddress[ETHER_ADDR_LEN]; /* MAC address of station */
1031} T_ConnectionAttempt;

1033//Maximum string size of a capability, including null termination
1034#define MAX_CAP_SIZE 17
1040typedef struct {
1041
1045 const char* Name;
1051 void (* changeHandler)(struct WLD_RADIO* pR);
1052} T_Radio_Capability;

1074/* Local WPS parameters */
1075typedef struct {
1076 char DefaultPin[12]; /* 8-digit format wps pin */
1077 char DevName[32]; /* Device name */
1078 char OUI[16]; /* Device OUI */
1079 char FriendlyName[32]; /* Device friendly name */
1080 char Manufacturer[32]; /* Manufacture Name */
1081 char ManufacturerUrl[128]; /* Manufacture URL link */
1082 char ModelDescription[64]; /* Full model description */
1083 char ModelName[32]; /* Vendor name */
1084 char ModelNumber[32]; /* Vendor number */
1085 char ModelUrl[128]; /* Vendor URL link */
1086 char OsVersion[32]; /* OS version ID (A.B.C.D) */
1087 char SerialNumber[32]; /* Serial number (partly) */
1088 char UUID[40]; /* UUID */
1089 int wpsSupVer; /* WPS version supported */
1090 int wpsUUIDShared; /* Same WPS UUID on plugin */
1091} T_CONST_WPS;
1092
1093struct S_CWLD_FUNC_TABLE;
1094
1095/* Store a delayed WPS_pushButton command */
1096typedef struct S_WPS_pushButton_Delay {
1097 amxp_timer_t* timer; /* timer handler */
1098 union {
1099 struct T_AccessPoint* vap; /* Keep handler of the VAP */
1100 struct S_EndPoint* pEP;
1101 } intf;
1102 char val[128]; /* Save our command */
1103 int bufsize; /* Filled buffer size */
1104 int setAct; /* Action taken */
1105 uint64_t call_id; /* Function call handle */
1106 amxc_var_t* args; /* Arguments provided to the function */
1107} T_WPS_pushButton_Delay;
1108
1109/* Store wps session info: to clear wps pairing timer. */
1110typedef struct {
1111 amxp_timer_t* sessionTimer; /* wps session timer */
1112 amxd_object_t* intfObj; /* VAP/EP obj */
1113 bool WPS_PairingInProgress; /* bool representing whether pairing is in progress */
1114 swl_macBin_t peerMac; /* remote device MAC (Bssid for WPS enrollee (EP), Sta Mac for WPS registrar (AP)) */
1115 T_AccessPoint* pReferenceApRelay;
1116 bool addRelayApCredentials;
1117} wld_wpsSessionInfo_t;
1118
1119
1120//Note : scan type is more of what triggered the scanning not what the result has!
1121typedef enum {
1122 SCAN_TYPE_NONE, // Default none type
1123 SCAN_TYPE_INTERNAL, // Internal middleware to know AP environment => no ODL update
1124 SCAN_TYPE_SSID, // Scan done to get SSID list => need to update SSID ODL
1125 SCAN_TYPE_SPECTRUM, // Scan done to get Spectrum info => need to update spectrum info
1126 SCAN_TYPE_COMBINED, // Scan done to get SSID list and spectrum info => update ODL
1127 SCAN_TYPE_MAX
1128} wld_scan_type_e;
1129
1130
1131typedef struct {
1132 char* scanReason;

1135 uint32_t errorCount;

1137 amxd_object_t* object;
1138} wld_scanReasonStats_t;

1140typedef struct wld_scanResultSSID {
1141 uint8_t ssidLen;
1142 uint8_t ssid[SSID_NAME_LEN];
1143 swl_macBin_t bssid;
1144 int32_t snr;
1145 int32_t noise;
1146 int32_t rssi;
1147 int32_t channel;
1148 int32_t centreChannel;
1149 int32_t bandwidth;
1150 uint16_t beaconInterval;
1151 uint8_t dtimPeriod;
1152 swl_chanspec_ext_e extensionChannel;
1153
1154 // Not always filled in. In that case it is 0.
1155 uint16_t basicDataTransferRates;
1156 uint16_t supportedDataTransferRates;
1157 swl_radioStandard_m operatingStandards;
1158 swl_radioStandard_m supportedStandards;
1159
1160 swl_security_apMode_e secModeEnabled;
1161 swl_security_mfpMode_e mfpMode;
1162 swl_wps_cfgMethod_m WPS_ConfigMethodsEnabled;
1163 bool hasActiveWpsRegistrar;
1164 bool adhoc;
1165 int32_t linkrate;
1166 swl_security_encMode_e encryptionMode;
1167
1168 amxc_llist_t vendorIEs;
1169 amxc_llist_it_t it;
1170
1171 swl_80211_htCapInfo_m htCaps;
1172 swl_80211_vhtCapInfo_m vhtCaps;
1173 swl_80211_heCapInfo_m heCaps;
1174 swl_operatingClass_t operClass; // global operating class
1175
1176 //BSS load elements
1177 uint16_t stationCount;
1178 uint8_t channelUtilization;
1179} wld_scanResultSSID_t;

1185typedef struct wld_scanArgs {

1188 int ssidLen;

1193 char reason[64];

1231typedef struct wld_airStats {
1232 uint16_t load;
1233 int32_t noise;
1234 uint16_t bss_transmit_time; // time spent sending signal
1235 uint16_t bss_receive_time; // time spent receiving signal from within bss
1236 uint16_t other_bss_time; // time receiving signal from other bss
1237 uint16_t other_time; // time spent handling "other than wifi" signals
1238 uint16_t free_time; // time spent not sending nor receiving anything
1239 uint16_t total_time; // total time should match tx + rx + other_bss + noise + free
1240 uint32_t timestamp;
1241 uint8_t short_preamble_error_percentage;
1242 uint8_t long_preamble_error_percentage;
1243 amxc_var_t* vendorStats;
1244} wld_airStats_t;

1358typedef struct {
1359 int txBurst; /* enable / disable fragment burst, -1 is driver default */
1360 int amsdu; /* enable / disable amsdu, -1 is driver default */
1361 int ampdu; /* enable / disable ampdu, -1 is driver default */
1362 int fragThreshold; /* configure fragmentation threshold, -1 is driver default */
1363 int rtsThreshold; /* configure rts threshold, -1 is driver default */
1364 int txBeamforming; /* configure force tx beam forming, -1 is driver default */
1365 int vhtOmnEnabled; /* enable vht Operating mode notifications */
1366 int broadcastMaxBwCapability; /* broadcast max bw capability.*/
1367 wld_tpcMode_e tpcMode; /* configure transmit power control. */
1368 bool skipSocketIO; /* bool to skip socket IO */
1369} wld_driverCfg_t;

1372typedef struct {
1373 bool useBaseMacOffset; /* whether to use the base mac offset to calculate mac */
1374 bool useLocalBitForGuest; /* use local bit to make guest mac addresses. */
1375 int64_t baseMacOffset; /* offset value by which the base mac of radio should be offsetted from WAN_ADDR */
1376 int64_t localGuestMacOffset; /* offset value by which local macs should be incremented compared to base radio mac */
1377 uint32_t nrBssRequired; /* number of bss required, to be used for MAC Addr management */
1378} wld_macCfg_t;

1451struct WLD_RADIO {
1452 int debug; /* FIX ME */
1453 vendor_t* vendor;
1454 wld_status_e status;
1455 wld_status_changeInfo_t changeInfo;
1456 int maxBitRate;
1457 int index; /* Network device number */
1458 uint64_t wDevId; /* nl80211 wireless device id */
1459 int ref_index; /* Radio index number (0=wifi0,1=wifi1,...) */
1460 bool isReady; /* Radio is ready for config and management (i.e. caps have been filled in, struct init done) */
1461 swl_freqBandExt_m supportedFrequencyBands;
1462 swl_freqBandExt_e operatingFrequencyBand;
1463
1464 // Never contains `M_SWL_RADSTD_AUTO`.
1465 swl_radioStandard_m supportedStandards;
1466
1467 // Either `M_SWL_RADSTD_AUTO`, or a subset of `supportedStandards` different from 0.
1468 swl_radioStandard_m operatingStandards;
1469
1470 // Used to parse the string into `operatingStandards`, so you do not need
1471 // to look at `operatingStandardsFormat` when looking at `operatingStandards`
1472 // because dealing with `operatingStandardsFormat` is taken care of already.
1473 swl_radStd_format_e operatingStandardsFormat;
1474
1475 swl_channel_t possibleChannels[WLD_MAX_POSSIBLE_CHANNELS];
1476 int nrPossibleChannels;
1477 swl_channel_t radarDetectedChannels[WLD_MAX_POSSIBLE_CHANNELS];
1478 uint8_t nrRadarDetectedChannels;
1479 swl_channel_t lastRadarChannelsAdded[SWL_BW_CHANNELS_MAX];
1480 uint8_t nrLastRadarChannelsAdded;
1481
1482 unsigned char MACAddr[ETHER_ADDR_LEN];
1483 swl_macBin_t mbssBaseMACAddr; /* multiple BSS base mac address: */
1484 /* may be shifted radio base mac, to handle enough bss macs. */
1485
1486 /* Add STA & WDS support. */
1487 bool isAP; /* Currenlty FIX TRUE! */
1488 bool isSTA; /* as both isAP && isSTA is true, we've APSTA */
1489 bool isWDS; /* Wireless Distributed System - 4MAC mode */
1490 bool isWET; /* Wireless Ethernet bridging - 3MAC + STA MAC/IP NAT */
1491 bool isSTASup; /* Is STA supported? Has impact the way we manage the Radio! */
1492 bool isWPSEnrol; /* Set WPS Enrollee mode when STA is active! */
1493
1494 char channelsInUse[64]; /* String presentation of used channels */
1495 swl_channel_t channel; /* When set we set autoChannelEnable FALSE */
1496 wld_channelChangeReason_e channelChangeReason; /* The cause of the last channel change */
1497 int autoChannelSupported;
1503 bool externalAcsMgmt;
1508 bool autoChannelEnable;
1509 int autoChannelSetByUser; /* Keep track of UI interaction on the autoChannelEnable */
1510 int autoChannelRefreshPeriod;
1511 swl_radBw_e operatingChannelBandwidth; /* bandwidth as requested by user */
1512 swl_radBw_e runningChannelBandwidth; /* bandwidth currently configured */
1513 swl_radBw_m supportedChannelBandwidth; /* SupportedBandwidths */
1514 wld_channelChangeReason_e channelBandwidthChangeReason; /* The cause of the last channel's Bandwidth change */
1515 swl_bandwidth_e maxChannelBandwidth; /* max available bandwidth */
1516 wld_rad_channelInternalStatus_e channelShowing;
1517 wld_rad_detailedChanState_t targetChanspec;
1518 swl_function_deferredInfo_t callIdReqChanspec;
1519 amxp_timer_t* timerReqChanspec;
1520 wld_rad_detailedChanState_t currentChanspec;
1521 swl_chanspec_t userChanspec;
1522 uint16_t totalNrTargetChanspecChanges; /* Total number of target chanspec changes */
1523 uint16_t totalNrCurrentChanspecChanges; /* Total number of current chanspec changes */
1524 uint16_t channelChangeCounters[CHAN_REASON_MAX]; /* Counter for channel changes */
1525 uint32_t channelChangeListSize; /* Maximum number of channel changes entries */
1526 int32_t acsBootChannel; /* IEEE Channel number to be used at boot, for the first channel set */
1527 amxc_llist_t channelChangeList; /* List of channel changes */
1528 wld_rad_bwSelectMode_e autoBwSelectMode; /* channel bandwidth pushed for a fixed channel */
1529 bool obssCoexistenceEnabled; /* Enable the coexistence Bandwidth */
1530 bool obssCoexistenceActive; /* Obss coexistence activated */
1531 swl_operatingClass_t operatingClass;
1532 wld_channel_extensionPos_e extensionChannel;
1533 swl_guardinterval_e guardInterval;
1534 int MCS; /* Modulation Coding Scheme index */
1535 int8_t transmitPowerSupported[64]; /* Steps that can be set */
1536 int transmitPower; /* Percentual transmit power [0..100] */
1537 int drvPowerVal; /* Most drivers use it in dB value */
1538 int actAntennaCtrl; /* bit-pattern of Active radio antennas */
1539 int rxChainCtrl; /* bit-pattern of configured rx radio antennas, -1 is default */
1540 int txChainCtrl; /* bit-pattern of configured tx radio antennas, -1 is default */
1541 uint8_t retryLimit; /* The maximum number of retransmissions of a short packet */
1542 uint8_t longRetryLimit; /* The maximum number of retransmissions of a long packet */
1543 bool twtEnable; /* Enable the target wake time 11ax feature */
1544 bool IEEE80211hSupported; /* Indicate if we've 802.11h support */
1545 bool IEEE80211kSupported; /* Indicate if we've 802.11k support */
1546 bool IEEE80211rSupported; /* Indicate if we've 802.11r support */
1547 wld_multiap_type_m m_multiAPTypesSupported; /* Indicate if we've 802.11r support */
1548 bool setRadio80211hEnable; /* Enable 802.11h */
1549 int regulatoryDomainIdx; /* Responding country code */
1550 char regulatoryDomain[8]; /* Country code (BE, FR, EU, US,...)*/
1551 wld_cfg11ax_t cfg11ax;
1552 bool implicitBeamFormingSupported;
1553 bool implicitBeamFormingEnabled;
1554 bool explicitBeamFormingSupported;
1555 bool explicitBeamFormingEnabled;
1556 swl_80211_htCapInfo_m htCapabilities; /* HT(High Throughput) 802.11n capabilities*/
1557 uint8_t htMcsSet[SWL_80211_MCS_SET_LEN]; /* The Supported HT-MCS Set */
1558 swl_80211_vhtCapInfo_m vhtCapabilities; /* VHT(very High Throughput) 802.11ac capabilities*/
1559 uint8_t vhtMcsNssSet[SWL_80211_VHT_MCS_NSS_SIZE]; /* The Supported VHT-MCS and NSS Set */
1560 swl_80211_hecap_macCapInfo_t heMacCapabilities; /* HE(High Efficiency) 802.11ax mac capabilities */
1561 swl_80211_hecap_phyCapInfo_t hePhyCapabilities; /* HE(High Efficiency) 802.11ax phy capabilities */
1562 swl_80211_hecap_MCSCap_t heMcsCaps[SWL_80211_HECAP_MCS_CAP_ARRAY_SIZE]; /* The Supported HE-MCS and NSS Set */
1563 wld_rifs_mode_e RIFSEnabled;
1564 bool airtimeFairnessEnabled; /* Enable airtime fairness feature */
1565 bool intAirtimeSchedEnabled; /* Enable intelligent airtime scheduling*/
1566 bool rxPowerSaveEnabled; /* Enable receive chain power save*/
1567 bool rxPowerSaveEnabledWhenRepeater; /* Enable receive chain power save when repeater*/
1568 bool multiUserMIMOSupported; /* Whether MU MIMO is supported */
1569 bool multiUserMIMOEnabled; /* Whether MU MIMO is enabled */
1570 bool kickRoamStaEnabled; /* Enable kicking of roaming stations in this rad */
1571 bool ofdmaEnable; /* Whether OFDMA is enabled */
1572 wld_he_cap_m heCapsSupported; /* Which 11ax he caps are supported */
1573 wld_he_cap_m heCapsEnabled; /* Which 11ax he caps are enabled */
1574 wld_rad_bf_cap_m bfCapsSupported[COM_DIR_MAX]; /* Which beamforming capabilities are available */
1575 wld_rad_bf_cap_m bfCapsEnabled[COM_DIR_MAX]; /* Which beamforming capabilities are enabled */
1576 int32_t nrAntenna[COM_DIR_MAX]; /* Number of antennas available. -1 means undefined */
1577 int32_t nrActiveAntenna[COM_DIR_MAX]; /* Number of antennas active. -1 means undefined */
1578 uint16_t rtsThreshold; /* Number of octets in an MPDU below which an RTS/CTS handshake is not performed */
1579 uint32_t beaconPeriod; /* Beaconing period in ms */
1580 uint32_t dtimPeriod; /* Delivery Traffic Information Map period, in nrBeacons*/
1581 wld_preamble_type_e preambleType; /* Longer preamble are needed by 802.11g to coexist with legacy systems 802.11 and 802.11b */
1582 bool packetAggregationEnable; /* Enable packet Aggregation (commonly called "frame aggregation") */
1583 unsigned int DFSChannelChangeEventCounter; /* Number of DFS channel change events */
1584 swl_timeReal_t DFSChannelChangeEventTimestamp; /* Last DFS channel change event realTime value */
1585 uint8_t dfsFileLogLimit; /* MAX number of DFS events to be saved into dfsEvent log file */
1586 uint8_t dfsEventLogLimit; /* MAX number of DFS events to be saved into datamodel */
1587 uint8_t dfsEventNbr; /* Number of DFS events currently in datamodel */
1588 uint8_t dfsFileEventNbr; /* Number of DFS events currently in dfsEvent log file */
1589
1590 unsigned long drv_caps; /* Driver capablities for this Radio */
1591
1592 T_Stats stats; /* Radio statistics */
1593 swla_dm_objActionReadCtx_t onReadStatsCtx; /* Radio.Stats object read handler ctx */
1594 T_CONST_WPS* wpsConst; /* WPS constant strings (Build defined) */
1595 int currentStations; /* Stat the current # of stations connected to this radio */
1596 uint32_t currentVideoStations; /* Stat the current # of video endpoints connected to to this radio */
1597 int maxStations; /* config the MAX # of stations this radio can handle */
1598 uint32_t maxNrHwBss; /* The max nr of Bss that radio can create (determined by hardware) */
1599 uint32_t maxNrHwSta; /* The max nr of stations that radio can create (determined by hardware) */
1600
1601 amxc_llist_t llAP; /* VAP linked list on this radio (used when commit is used)! */
1602 amxc_llist_t llEndPoints; /* Endpoints linked list on this radio (used when commit is used)! */
1603
1604 FSM_STATE fsm_radio_st; /* Radio FSM state? */
1605 T_FSM fsmRad; /* Global Radio FSM state */
1606 wld_fsmStats_t fsmStats; /* Statistics on FSM usage */
1607 int fsmTO;
1608
1609 bool stationMonitorEnabled;
1610 bool stationMonitorOffChannelSupported;
1611
1616 amxc_llist_t naStations;
1617
1624 amxc_llist_t monitorDev; /* @listof T_MonitorDevice */
1625
1626 T_ScanState scanState; /* SSID Scan state */
1627
1628 int enable; /* Enable/Disable the Radio */
1629 int wlRadio_SK; /* Storage of the Radio Socket handler */
1630 char Name[IFNAMSIZ]; /* The interface name */
1631 char instanceName[IFNAMSIZ]; /* The object name */
1632 struct S_CWLD_FUNC_TABLE* pFA; /* Function Array */
1633 uint64_t call_id; /* Used for delayed function return state */
1634 int blockCommit; /* Blocks TR98-commit way, edit(), ..XXX.. , commit()! */
1635 swl_timeMono_t blockStart; /* Set when block was started */
1636 int ignoreWPSEvents; /* Ignore commands received from wpa_talk when this is set */
1637 amxc_llist_it_t it;
1638 amxd_object_t* pBus; /* Keep a copy of the amxd_object_t */
1639 bool hasDmReady; /* Radio datamodel is ready for write actions */
1640 void* vendorData; /* Additional vendor specific data */
1641 const T_Radio_Capability* capabilities;
1642 T_Radio_Cap_Item* cap_status;
1643 char* suppDrvCaps[SWL_FREQ_BAND_MAX]; /* supported driver capabilities per supported frequency band (at freqBand index). */
1644 wld_rad_bgdfs_config_t bgdfs_config;
1645 wld_rad_bgdfs_stats_t bgdfs_stats;
1646 chanmgt_rad_state detailedState;
1647 chanmgt_rad_state detailedStatePrev;
1648 int nrCapabilities;
1649 wld_feature_status features[WLD_FEATURE_MAX];
1650 T_EventCounterList vendorCounters;
1651 T_EventCounter counterList[WLD_RAD_EV_MAX];
1652 T_EventCounterList genericCounters;
1653 int dbgEnable; /* Enable Deamon debugging */
1654 char* dbgOutput; /* Filename to store data */
1655 T_RssiEventing naStaRssiMonitor;
1656 wld_rad_muMimoInfo_t radMuMimoInfo; /* MU MIMO Info. */
1657 wld_driverCfg_t driverCfg; /* Detailed driver config options */
1658 wld_macCfg_t macCfg; /* Detailed driver config options */
1659 wld_rad_delayMgr_t delayMgr;
1660 wld_autoCommitRadData_t autoCommitData; /* struct for managing auto commiting */
1661 wld_nl80211_listener_t* nl80211Listener; /* nl80211 events listener */
1662 wld_secDmn_t* hostapd; /* hostapd daemon context. */
1663 uint32_t wiphy; /* nl80211 wireless physical device id */
1664 char wiphyName[IFNAMSIZ]; /* nl80211 wireless physical device name */
1665 wld_nl80211_channelSurveyInfo_t* pLastSurvey; /* last active chan survey result (cached) */
1666 wld_airStats_t* pLastAirStats; /* last air stats calculated based on diff with active chan survey result (cached for nl80211) */
1667 bool csiEnable; /* Enable CSI */
1668 amxc_llist_t csiClientList; /* CSI client list */
1669 char firmwareVersion[64]; /* Radio’s WiFi firmware version */
1670 char chipVendorName[64]; /* Radio’s Hw vendor name */
1671
1672 wld_extMod_dataList_t extDataList; /* Non chipset vendor module data list. @type wld_extMod_registration_t */
1673
1674 wld_radioCap_t cap; /* Datamodel capabilities; */
1675
1676 swl_mcs_legacyIndex_m supportedDataTransmitRates; /* Supported data transmit rates in Mbps */
1677 swl_mcs_legacyIndex_m operationalDataTransmitRates; /* Data transmit rates in Mbps at which the radio will permit operation with any associated station */
1678 swl_mcs_legacyIndex_m basicDataTransmitRates; /* The set of data rates, in Mbps, that have to be supported by all stations that desire to join this BSS */
1679 void* zwdfsData; /* ZW DFS data */
1680
1681 wld_mbssidAdvertisement_mode_m suppMbssidAdsModes; /* supported MBSSID Advertisement modes */
1682 wld_mbssidAdvertisement_mode_e mbssidAdsMode; /* operating MBSSID Advertisement mode. */
1683 amxp_timer_t* setMaxNumStaTimer; /* Timer used to delay the setMaxNumStation task */
1684};
1685
1686typedef struct {
1687 T_Radio* radio;
1688 wld_status_e oldStatus;
1689 chanmgt_rad_state oldDetailedState;
1690} wld_radio_status_change_event_t;
1691
1692typedef enum {
1693 WLD_AUTOMACSRC_DUMMY, /* mac is generated from a dummy base */
1694 WLD_AUTOMACSRC_RADIO_BASE, /* mac is generated from radio base mac */
1695 WLD_AUTOMACSRC_MAX,
1696} wld_autoMacSrc_e;
1697
1698struct S_SSID {
1699 amxc_llist_it_t it;
1700 int debug; /* Magic header to validate SSID ctx */
1701 wld_status_e status; /* == AP/ENDP.Status --> VAP up == TRUE else FALSE */
1702 wld_status_changeInfo_t changeInfo; /* Status change info */
1703 T_Radio* RADIO_PARENT; /* Pointer to the T_Radio structure */
1704 T_AccessPoint* AP_HOOK; /* Pointer to the T_AccessPoint structure */
1705 T_EndPoint* ENDP_HOOK; /* Pointer to the T_EndPoint structure */
1706 unsigned char BSSID[ETHER_ADDR_LEN]; /* BSSID of interface. VAP => same as MAC, EP => BSSID of connected AP */
1707 unsigned char MACAddress[ETHER_ADDR_LEN]; /* Mac Address of the interface */
1708 char SSID[36]; /* VAP SSID broadcast name */
1709 char Name[32]; /* Contains the datamodel name of this SSID */
1710 T_Stats stats;
1711 bool enable; /* current internal value of SSID.Enable */
1712 bool targetEnable; /* The actual enable value this interface shall be. */
1713 amxd_object_t* pBus; /* Keep a copy of the amxd_object_t */
1714 void* vendorData; /* Additional vendor specific data */
1715 amxp_timer_t* enableSyncTimer; /* Timer to keep the SSID and Intf enable synced */
1716 bool syncEnableToIntf; /* Whether the sync should be SSID to intf (true) or other way (false)*/
1717 int32_t bssIndex; /* interface creation order among all radio's interfaces */
1718 int32_t mldUnit; /* the index in which "mld unit" this SSID is located */
1719 wld_autoMacSrc_e autoMacSrc; /* auto generated mac source: from radio (/or dummy) base mac, or statically learned from driver */
1720 uint32_t autoMacRefIndex; /* mac address offset from source base mac */
1721 char customNetDevName[IFNAMSIZ]; /* custom interface name set by dm conf */
1722 bool initDone; /* Whether this SSID is properly initialized, and ready for configuration */
1723
1724 wld_mldLink_t* pMldLink;
1725};
1726
1727typedef struct {
1728 int enable; /* Enable/Disable HotSpot2.0 */
1729 bool dgaf_disable;
1730 bool l2_traffic_inspect;
1731 bool icmpv4_echo;
1732 bool interworking;
1733 bool internet;
1734 bool hs2_ie; /* Show HotSpot Info Element in BF */
1735 bool p2p_enable;
1736 int32_t gas_delay;
1737 int8_t access_network_type;
1738 int8_t venue_type;
1739 int8_t venue_group;
1740} T_HotSpot2;

1742typedef struct {
1743 uint32_t nrToggles;
1744 uint32_t nrToggleDisconnects;
1745 uint32_t nrErrorToggles;
1746 uint32_t nrErrorTogglesDisconnects;
1747} T_ApMgtStats;

1749typedef enum {
1750 VENDOR_IE_BEACON,
1751 VENDOR_IE_PROBE_RESP,
1752 VENDOR_IE_ASSOC_RESP,
1753 VENDOR_IE_AUTH_RESP,
1754 VENDOR_IE_PROBE_REQ,
1755 VENDOR_IE_ASSOC_REQ,
1756 VENDOR_IE_AUTH_REQ,
1757 VENDOR_IE_MAX
1758} wld_vendorIeFrame_e;

1760#define M_VENDOR_IE_BEACON (1 << VENDOR_IE_BEACON)
1761#define M_VENDOR_IE_PROBE_RESP (1 << VENDOR_IE_PROBE_RESP)
1762#define M_VENDOR_IE_ASSOC_RESP (1 << VENDOR_IE_ASSOC_RESP)
1763#define M_VENDOR_IE_AUTH_RESP (1 << VENDOR_IE_AUTH_RESP)
1764#define M_VENDOR_IE_PROBE_REQ (1 << VENDOR_IE_PROBE_REQ)
1765#define M_VENDOR_IE_ASSOC_REQ (1 << VENDOR_IE_ASSOC_REQ)
1766#define M_VENDOR_IE_AUTH_REQ (1 << VENDOR_IE_AUTH_REQ)
1767
1768#define WLD_VENDORIE_T_DATA_SIZE 256
1769
1770typedef uint32_t wld_vendorIeFrame_m;
1771
1772typedef struct {
1773 amxc_llist_it_t it;

1775 char data[WLD_VENDORIE_T_DATA_SIZE];
1776 wld_vendorIeFrame_m frame_type; /* Types of frame that sent vendor IE */
1777 amxd_object_t* object;
1778} wld_vendorIe_t;

1782 WLD_VAP_DRIVER_CFG_CHANGE_BSS_MAX_IDLE_PERIOD,
1783 WLD_VAP_DRIVER_CFG_CHANGE_MAX
1784} wld_vap_driverCfgChange_e;

1794 bool interworkingEnable;
1795 char qosMapSet[QOS_MAP_SET_MAX_LEN];
1796} wld_cfg11u_t;

1799 swl_trl_e emlmrEnable;

1804
1805struct S_ACCESSPOINT {
1806 int debug; /* FIX ME */
1807 wld_intfStatus_e status;
1808 swl_timeMono_t lastStatusChange; /* timestamp when the status changed last */
1809 char name[AP_NAME_SIZE]; /* Contains the object name of this interface */
1810 char alias[AP_NAME_SIZE]; /* Contains the netdev name of this interface */
1811 char bridgeName[IFNAMSIZ]; /* Contains the name of the bridge which contains this vap interface */
1812 int index; /* Network device number */
1813 uint64_t wDevId; /* nl80211 wireless device id */
1814 int ref_index; /* VAP index number, basically the index of the VAP in the radio's AP list */
1815 int SSIDReference; /* Index # in the T_SSID entry table */
1816
1817 T_SSID* pSSID; /* Contains a direct pointer to the created SSID for this VAP */
1818 T_Radio* pRadio; /* Contains a direct pointer to the parent of this VAP */
1819
1820 bool SSIDAdvertisementEnabled;
1821 bool initDone; /* Whether this AP is properly initialized, and ready for configuration */
1822 int retryLimit;
1823 bool WMMCapability;
1824 bool UAPSDCapability;
1825 bool WMMEnable;
1826 bool UAPSDEnable;
1827 int MCEnable; /* multicast enable */
1828 int doth;
1829 int APBridgeDisable;
1830 int ActiveAssociatedDeviceNumberOfEntries;
1831 int AssociatedDeviceNumberOfEntries;
1832 int MaxStations;
1833 uint16_t StaInactivityTimeout;
1834 bool IEEE80211kEnable;
1835 bool IEEE80211rEnable;
1836 bool IEEE80211rFTOverDSEnable;
1837 char NASIdentifier[NAS_IDENTIFIER_MAX_LEN]; /* NAS Identifier, unique per AP */
1838 char R0KHKey[KHKEY_MAX_LEN]; /* R0 key used by the AP */
1839 uint16_t mobilityDomain; /* MobilityDomain, common to all APs inside the network */
1840 wld_cfg11u_t cfg11u;
1841 swl_security_apMode_m secModesAvailable; /* Bit pattern for available security modes */
1842 swl_security_apMode_m secModesSupported; /* Bit pattern for supported security modes */
1843 swl_security_apMode_e secModeEnabled; /* ModesSupported. */
1844 char WEPKey[36]; /* Max 32, but we need some 0 for termination (and alignment) */
1845 char preSharedKey[PSK_KEY_SIZE_LEN];
1846 char keyPassPhrase[PSK_KEY_SIZE_LEN];
1847 char saePassphrase[SAE_KEY_SIZE_LEN];
1848 wld_enc_modes_e encryptionModeEnabled;
1849 swl_security_mfpMode_e mfpConfig;
1850 int sppAmsdu;
1851 int rekeyingInterval;
1852 int SHA256Enable; /* (NEW) If supported add extra key protection */
1853 char oweTransModeIntf[32];
1854 wld_ap_td_m transitionDisable; /* Transition Disable indication */
1855
1856 char radiusServerIPAddr[16];
1857 int radiusServerPort;
1858 char radiusSecret[64];
1859 int radiusDefaultSessionTimeout;
1860 char radiusOwnIPAddress[40];
1861 char radiusNASIdentifier[128];
1862 char radiusCalledStationId[88];
1863 int radiusChargeableUserId;
1864
1865 int WPS_CertMode; /* Correct default behavior for Certification Mode */
1866 int WPS_Enable; /* WPS enabled? */
1867 wld_wps_status_e WPS_Status; /* WPS real status */
1868 bool WPS_ApSetupLocked; /* Whether WPS AP Pin is locked */
1869 int WPS_Registrar; /* Enable the Registrar */
1870 wld_wps_cfgMethod_m WPS_ConfigMethodsSupported; /* bit mask of supported wps config methods */
1871 wld_wps_cfgMethod_m WPS_ConfigMethodsEnabled; /* bit mask of enabled wps config methods */
1872 int WPS_Configured; /* Not in ODL but required */
1873 char WPS_ClientPIN[16]; /* Client PIN used for this VAP */
1874 struct S_WPS_pushButton_Delay WPS_PBC_Delay; /* PushButton delay, commit running */
1875 wld_wpsSessionInfo_t wpsSessionInfo; /* WPS session context (with safety timer, to close session beyond WPS walk time) */
1876 bool addRelayApCredentials; /* Use relay accesspoint as WPS credentials */
1877 bool wpsRestartOnRequest; /* bool representing whether restarting wps within a wps session is allowed */
1878
1879 T_HotSpot2 HotSpot2;
1880 int CurrentAssociatedDevice;
1881 T_AssociatedDevice** AssociatedDevice;
1882 wld_mfMode_e MF_Mode;
1883 int MF_EntryCount;
1884 char* MF_AddressList;
1885 bool MF_AddressListBlockSync; /* Block MF_AddressLIst update when multiple objects are added/deleted */
1886 unsigned char MF_Entry[MAXNROF_MFENTRY][ETHER_ADDR_LEN];
1887 bool MF_TempBlacklistEnable;
1888 int MF_TempEntryCount;
1889 unsigned char MF_Temp_Entry[MAXNROF_MFENTRY][ETHER_ADDR_LEN];
1890 int PF_TempEntryCount;
1891 unsigned char PF_Temp_Entry[MAXNROF_PFENTRY][ETHER_ADDR_LEN];
1892 amxc_llist_t neighbours;
1893 wld_ap_dm_m discoveryMethod;
1894
1895 int defaultDeviceType; /* Default device type: index of device type in cstr_DEVICE_TYPES*/
1896
1897 int enable;
1898 //int wlradio_sk; Use RADIO pointer for this (if needed)
1899 int wlvap_sk;
1900 T_FSM fsm;
1901 struct S_CWLD_FUNC_TABLE* pFA; /* Function Array */
1902 amxc_llist_it_t it;
1903 amxd_object_t* pBus; /* Keep a copy of the amxd_object_t */
1904 void* vendorData; /* Additional vendor specific data for chipset vendor only*/
1905
1906 int dbgEnable; /* Enable Deamon debugging */
1907 char* dbgOutput; /* Filename to store data */
1908 T_RssiEventing rssiEventing; /* Struct to keep track of RssiEventing */
1909 T_ApMgtStats mgtStats; /* Statistics with regards to management */
1910 bool wdsEnable; /* Enable 4 mac address */
1911 wld_multiap_type_m multiAPType; /* Bitmask of all MultiAP type applied to this accesspoint */
1912 wld_multiap_profile_e multiAPProfile; /* MultiAP profile status */
1913 uint16_t multiAPVlanId; /* Primary VLAN ID config for MultiAP */
1914 wld_apRole_e apRole; /* Current AccessPoint role */
1915 T_AccessPoint* pReferenceApRelay; /* Use the credentials of this AP inside WPS M8 */
1916 bool mboEnable; /* Enable multi band operation*/
1917 wld_mbo_denyReason_e mboDenyReason; /* MBO Assoc Disallow Reason to add to the MBO IE*/
1918 bool enableVendorIEs; /* Enable the broadcast of custom vendor IEs */
1919 amxc_llist_t vendorIEs; /* List of vendor IE */
1920 wld_fcallState_t stationsStatsState; /* Station stats state */
1921 wld_vapConfigDriver_t driverCfg; /* Detailed driver config options */
1922
1923 /* Table of recent station disconnections.
1924 * Only for stations that were authenticated. Stations that did not get authenticated
1925 * will not be added to this list */
1926 swl_unLiTable_t staDcList;
1927 int32_t historyCnt;
1928
1929 wld_nl80211_listener_t* nl80211Listener; /* nl80211 events listener */
1930 wld_wpaCtrlInterface_t* wpaCtrlInterface; /* wpaCtrlInterface to hostapd interface */
1931 bool clientIsolationEnable;
1932 swl_circTable_t lastAssocReq; /* (mac, bssid, assoc/reassoc frame, timestamp,assocType) where station mac format: xx:xx:xx:xx:xx:xx */
1933 uint32_t lastDevIndex;
1934 wld_extMod_dataList_t extDataList; /* list of extention data for non-chipset vendor modules */
1935 amxc_llist_t llIntfWds; /* list of wds interface related to this VAP (wld_wds_intf_t) */
1936 wld_apMldCfg_t mldCfg; /* MLD config options */
1937};

1954typedef enum {
1955 WLD_VAP_CHANGE_EVENT_CREATE, // Initial creation of object, no transaction possible
1956 WLD_VAP_CHANGE_EVENT_CREATE_FINAL, // Evented add handler, transaction possible (referencing ssid/radio)
1957 WLD_VAP_CHANGE_EVENT_DESTROY,
1958 WLD_VAP_CHANGE_EVENT_DEINIT, // VAP de-initialized (ie not referencing to ssid/radio)
1959 WLD_VAP_CHANGE_EVENT_MAX
1960} wld_vap_changeEvent_e;
1961
1962typedef struct {
1963 wld_vap_changeEvent_e changeType;
1964 T_AccessPoint* vap;
1965 void* data;
1966} wld_vap_changeEvent_t;

1969 WLD_VAP_ACTION_RSSI_SAMPLE,
1970 WLD_VAP_ACTION_STEER,
1971 WLD_VAP_ACTION_KICK,
1972 WLD_VAP_ACTION_MAX,
1973} wld_vap_actionEvent_e;

1975typedef struct {
1976 wld_vap_actionEvent_e changeType;
1977 T_AccessPoint* vap;
1978 void* data;
1979} wld_vap_actionEvent_t;
1980
1981typedef enum {
1982 WLD_EP_CHANGE_EVENT_CREATE, // Initial creation of object, no transaction possible
1983 WLD_EP_CHANGE_EVENT_CREATE_FINAL, // Evented add handler, transaction possible
1984 WLD_EP_CHANGE_EVENT_DESTROY,
1985 WLD_EP_CHANGE_EVENT_MAX
1986} wld_ep_changeEvent_e;
1987
1988typedef struct {
1989 wld_ep_changeEvent_e changeType;
1990 T_EndPoint* ep;
1991 void* data;
1992} wld_ep_changeEvent_t;

1994typedef enum {
1995 WLD_AD_CHANGE_EVENT_CREATE,
1996 WLD_AD_CHANGE_EVENT_ASSOC,
1997 WLD_AD_CHANGE_EVENT_AUTH,

2001} wld_ad_changeEvent_e;

2023 uint32_t rxbyte;

2026typedef struct {
2027 swl_timeMono_t lastAssocTime;
2028 swl_timeMono_t lastDisassocTime;
2029 uint32_t nrAssociations;
2030 uint32_t nrAssocAttempts;
2031 uint32_t nrAssocAttemptsSinceDc;

2033
2034typedef struct {
2035 uint32_t LastDataDownlinkRate;
2036 uint32_t LastDataUplinkRate;
2037 int32_t SignalStrength; // Received signal strength in dBm, -1 if unavailable
2038 int32_t noise; // Measured noise floor in dBm, -1 if unavailable
2039 int32_t SignalNoiseRatio; // Signal to noise radio, dBm, 0 if unavailable
2040 int32_t RSSI; // Received signal strength indicator in percent
2041 uint32_t Retransmissions;
2042 uint64_t txbyte;
2043 uint32_t txPackets;
2044 uint32_t txRetries;
2045 uint64_t rxbyte;
2046 uint32_t rxPackets;
2047 uint32_t rxRetries;
2050 wld_assocDev_capabilities_t assocCaps;
2051 swl_radStd_e operatingStandard;
2052
2053 uint16_t maxRxStream;
2054 uint16_t maxTxStream;
2055} T_EndPointStats;
2056
2057struct _EndPointProfile;
2058typedef struct _EndPointProfile T_EndPointProfile;
2059
2060struct S_EndPoint {
2061 int debug; /* FIX ME */
2062 wld_intfStatus_e status;
2063 char bridgeName[IFNAMSIZ]; /* The bridge interface name */
2064 wld_epConnectionStatus_e connectionStatus;
2065 swl_timeMono_t lastConnStatusChange;
2066 wld_ep_assocStats_t assocStats;
2067 wld_epError_e error;
2068 char Name[16]; /* The interface name */
2069 char alias[32];
2070 int index; /* Network device number */
2071 int ref_index; /* VAP index number (used bcm nvram) */
2072 int SSIDReference; /* Index # in the T_SSID entry table */
2073
2074 T_EndPointProfile* currentProfile;
2075 amxc_llist_t llProfiles;
2076
2077 T_SSID* pSSID; /* Contains a direct pointer to the created SSID for this VAP */
2078 T_Radio* pRadio; /* Contains a direct pointer to the parent of this VAP */
2079
2080 swl_security_apMode_m secModesSupported; /* Bit pattern for supported security modes */
2081
2082 bool WPS_Enable; /* WPS enabled? */
2083 int WPS_Configured; /* Not in ODL but required */
2084 wld_wps_cfgMethod_m WPS_ConfigMethodsSupported; /* bit mask of supported wps config methods */
2085 wld_wps_cfgMethod_m WPS_ConfigMethodsEnabled; /* bit mask of enabled wps config methods */
2086 char WPS_ClientPIN[16]; /* Client PIN used for this VAP */
2087 T_WPS_pushButton_Delay WPS_PBC_Delay; /* To delay the push button when state machine not idle */
2088 wld_wpsSessionInfo_t wpsSessionInfo; /* WPS session context (with safety timer, to close session beyond WPS walk time) */
2089 uint32_t reconnect_count; /* Amount of reconnect retries currently done */
2090 uint32_t reconnect_rad_trigger; /* Amount of reconnect retries before toggling the radio */
2091
2092 int enable;
2093 T_FSM fsm;
2094 struct S_CWLD_FUNC_TABLE* pFA; /* Function Array */
2095 amxc_llist_it_t it;
2096 amxd_object_t* pBus; /* Keep a copy of the amxd_object_t */
2097 void* vendorData; /* Additional vendor specific data */
2098 bool internalChange; /* true when changing the data model internally for preventing handlers from executing. */
2099
2100 amxp_timer_t* reconnectTimer; /* Timer to retry connecting when the connection is lost/could not be made */
2101 uint32_t reconnectDelay; /* Minimum time before try to reconnect */
2102 uint32_t reconnectInterval; /* Minimum time between two reconnections attempt */
2103 bool multiAPEnable; /* Set MultiAP BackhaulSTA on this EndPoint */
2104 bool toggleBssOnReconnect; /* Disable hostapd on EP reconnection */
2105
2106 wld_multiap_profile_e multiAPProfile; /* MultiAP profile status */
2107 uint16_t multiAPVlanId; /* Primary VLAN ID config for MultiAP */
2108
2109 wld_tinyRoam_t* tinyRoam;
2110 wld_fcallState_t statsCall;
2111
2112 wld_nl80211_listener_t* nl80211Listener; /* nl80211 events listener */
2113 wld_wpaCtrlInterface_t* wpaCtrlInterface; /* wpaCtrlInterface to wpa_supplicant interface */
2114 wld_secDmn_t* wpaSupp; /* wpa_supplicant daemon context. */
2115 uint64_t wDevId; /* nl80211 wireless device id */
2116 T_EndPointStats stats;
2117 swla_dm_objActionReadCtx_t onActionReadCtx;
2118};
2119

2121 T_EndPoint* ep;
2122 wld_intfStatus_e oldStatus;
2123 wld_epConnectionStatus_e oldConnectionStatus;

2138 char preSharedKey[PSK_KEY_SIZE_LEN];
2139 char keyPassPhrase[PSK_KEY_SIZE_LEN];
2140 char saePassphrase[SAE_KEY_SIZE_LEN];
2141 swl_security_mfpMode_e mfpConfig;
2142 amxc_llist_it_t it;

2144 T_EndPoint* endpoint;
2145};

2175/*
2176 * @brief: create an VAP interface and attach it to the bottom layer
2177 * @param rad internal radio context
2178 * @param vapIfName the expected netdev interface name, MUST not be empty
2179 * @param vapIfNameSize ifname buffer size, to get a copy of the final iface name
2180 * @return the netdev index of the created interface (>0), error code <=0 otherwise
2181 */
2182typedef int (APIENTRY* PFN_WRAD_ADDVAPIF)(T_Radio* rad, char* vapIfName, int vapIfNameSize);

2246typedef struct {
2247 int16_t rssi_value[MAX_NR_ANTENNA];
2248 uint16_t nr_antenna;
2249} T_ANTENNA_RSSI;
2250typedef struct {
2251 double power_value[MAX_NR_ANTENNA];
2252 uint16_t nr_antenna;
2253} T_ANTENNA_POWER;
2254typedef struct {
2255 uint8_t token;
2256 uint16_t duration;
2257 uint16_t interval;
2258 swl_ieee802_rrmReqMode_m modeMask;
2259 swl_ieee802_rrmBeaconReqMode_e mode;
2260 swl_operatingClass_t operClass;
2261 swl_channel_t channel;
2262 swl_macChar_t bssid;
2263 char ssid[SSID_NAME_LEN];
2264 bool addNeighbor;
2265 char* optionalEltHexStr;
2266} wld_rrmReq_t;
2267typedef struct {
2268 uint32_t linkid;
2269 uint32_t txPackets;
2270 uint32_t txUbyte;
2271 uint32_t txBbyte;
2272 uint32_t txMbyte;
2273 uint32_t txEbyte;
2274 uint32_t rxEbyte;
2275 uint32_t rxPackets;
2276 uint32_t rxUbyte;
2277 uint32_t rxBbyte;
2278 uint32_t rxMbyte;
2279} wld_mloStats_t;

2362/* Sync issues, if enable and commit are mixed. For that we introduce some extra stages
2363 and a commit_pending flag in the state machine. But it also force us back todo a call
2364 to the upper layers sync_xxx2OBJ(). */
2365typedef void (APIENTRY* PFN_SYNC_RADIO)(amxd_object_t* object, T_Radio* pR, int set);
2366typedef void (APIENTRY* PFN_SYNC_AP)(amxd_object_t* object, T_AccessPoint* pAP, int set);
2367typedef void (APIENTRY* PFN_SYNC_SSID)(amxd_object_t* object, T_SSID* pS, int set);
2368typedef void (APIENTRY* PFN_SYNC_EP)(T_EndPoint* pEP);

2370/*
2371 * @brief handler of modified vendor parameters
2372 *
2373 * @param pRad Radio context when relevant (ie vendor subobj of radio), null otherwise
2374 * @param pAP AccessPoint context when relevant (ie vendor subobj of accessPoint), null otherwise
2375 * @param object modified vendor object (of child objects)
2376 * @param params modified parameters in variant htable (to: and from:)
2377 * @return SWL_RC_OK if successful, error code otherwise
2378 */
2379typedef swl_rc_ne (APIENTRY* PFN_WIFI_SUPVEND_MODES)(T_Radio* pRad, T_AccessPoint* pAP, amxd_object_t* object, amxc_var_t* params);
